description: A cognitive neuroscience laboratory has collected AX-CPT data to investigate proactive cognitive control. Analyze the dataset at ~/pebl/data/axcpt_data.csv (columns: participant_id, trial, cue, probe, response, rt_ms) to compute d'-context and PBI-RT (Proactive Behavioral Index) for each participant. The d'-context metric requires a log-linear correction [Corrected_Rate = (count + 0.5) / (total_condition_trials + 1)] to calculate z(Corrected_AX_Hit_Rate) - z(Corrected_BX_FA_Rate). The PBI-RT is defined as (mean_AY_RT - mean_BX_RT) / (mean_AY_RT + mean_BX_RT) using reaction times from correct trials. Participants with an uncorrected AX Hit Rate below 0.60 must be excluded from the group analysis. Export the results to ~/pebl/analysis/axcpt_report.json, including a 'participants' list (with 'id', 'd_prime_context', 'pbi_rt', and 'excluded' status/reason) and the group means for both metrics across all valid participants.
